productNotCreated: There was an error creating the product:
productNotUpdated: There was an error updating the product:
productNotDeleted: There was an error deleting the product:
categorysNotAssigned: There was an error assigning the categories:
imagesNotUploaded: There was an error uploading the images:
notNewCategorys: All categories have already been assigned
notNewImages: All images have already been uploaded
productsNotUploaded: There was an error uploading the data from the excel:
productsNotExported: There was an error exporting the products:
sendEmailError: There was an error while trying to send the registration email. User registered successfully.
sendEmailRecoveryPassword: An email was sent with instructions on how to recover the password.
